Everything You Need To Know To Get Started With Confidence
Which fund has higher returns, ICICI Prudential Multi-Asset Fund - Growth or Nippon India Multi Asset Allocation Fund - Regular Plan - Growth Option?
ICICI Prudential Multi-Asset Fund - Growth had a 5-year average annual growth rate of 17.92%, while Nippon India Multi Asset Allocation Fund - Regular Plan - Growth Option's was 15.04%. ICICI Prudential Multi-Asset Fund - Growth is better for long-term growth.
